retry_reason: kobject_put is void and always succeeds; the function unconditionally releases all references. There is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that frees a collection of kobjects previously stored in a kset's list. It iterates the list under spinlock, removes each element, and releases its reference via kobject_put, then finally releases the kset's own kobject. After calling this function, the caller must not access any of the released kobjects or the parent kset. The function assumes the list is not concurrently modified (the spinlock provides mutual exclusion for list operations). It does not return any value and always completes all releases.
